name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to requirements, process, or wireframe

labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / Opportunity

What problem does this change solve, and for whom?

## Proposed Change

Describe the desired behavior in testable form ("the system shall ...").

## Affected Areas

- [ ] docs/specs
- [ ] docs/architecture
- [ ] docs/protocols
- [ ] docs/transcripts
- [ ] ui wireframe
- [ ] scripts/ (build CSS/templates)
- [ ] CI workflow

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] criterion 1
- [ ] criterion 2

## References

Link related artifacts, protocols, or previous decisions.
